$comment: VS Code内蔵CSSバリデータにTailwind CSS v4のat-ruleを教えるカスタムデータ。.vscode/settings.jsonのcss.customDataから参照される。これが無いと@theme等がunknownAtRules警告になる

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines design tokens. Each token is emitted as a CSS variable and generates the corresponding utilities (e.g. --color-accent → bg-accent).

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS: inlines the given utility classes into a CSS rule.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom variant (e.g. a data-attribute based dark mode).

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: defines a custom utility class.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: applies a variant inside custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: registers extra source files to scan for class names.

atDirectives.name: @plugin
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a Tailwind plugin.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: loads a legacy JS config file.

atDirectives.name: @reference
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: imports theme/utilities for @apply without emitting CSS.
